questionHtml: Outline the criteria that should be used to assess whether a group of organisms is a species.
markschemeHtml:
a. organisms can potentially interbreed;

b. to produce fertile offspring;

c. same sequence of genes (on chromosomes) / same types of chromosomes;

d. similar traits/phenotype/WTTE;

e. same chromosome number/karyotype;

meta.title: Outline the criteria that should be used to assess whether a group of organisms is a species.
